mapper.sql: select version_id, item_id, version_no, chapter_id, knowledge_point_id, stem, answer, analysis, material_content, question_tags, quality_score, source, change_type, is_current, ai_model_id, ai_prompt_snapshot from sc_question_item_version
mapper.select: where item_id = #{itemId} order by version_no desc, version_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_question_item_version(item_id, version_no, chapter_id, knowledge_point_id, stem, answer, analysis, material_content, question_tags, quality_score, source, change_type, is_current, ai_model_id, ai_prompt_snapshot, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{itemId}, #{versionNo}, #{chapterId}, #{knowledgePointId}, #{stem}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{materialContent}, #{questionTags}, #{qualityScore}, #{source}, #{changeType}, #{isCurrent}, #{aiModelId}, #{aiPromptSnapshot}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_question_item_version set is_current = '0', update_time = sysdate() where item_id = #{itemId}
